_publications._publicationTitle: PRC2-Inactivating Mutations in Cancer Enhance Cytotoxic Response to DNMT1-Targeted Therapy via Enhanced Viral Mimicry.

_contextSnippet: We observed that DAC exhibits selective antitumor activity against PRC2-loss tumors
details: DAC exhibited selective antitumor activity against PRC2-loss tumors in xenograft models
